name: Modulr Payments & Embedded Finance API
what_it_does: Modulr Payments REST API for UK and European payment accounts and embedded finance platform. Enables AI agents to manage payment account creation and management for customers and businesses, handle Faster Payments, CHAPS, BACS, and SEPA payment initiation, access real-time transaction notification via webhooks for payment monitoring, retrieve account balance and transaction history for reconciliation, manage virtual sort codes and IBANs for payment routing, handle direct debit and mandate management automation, access bulk payment processing for payroll and disbursement, retrieve FX and international payment capabilities, manage open banking and PSD2 payment initiation flows, and integrate payment account data with accounting, ERP, and financial operations platforms.
use_cases: Automating supplier payments from accounts payable agents
Managing client payment accounts from marketplace agents
Processing payroll disbursements from HR automation agents
Reconciling payment transactions from financial operations agents
not_for: US-only payment processing without UK/EU payment requirements
Consumer retail payments without B2B or embedded finance context
Card issuance programs without payment account and banking focus
best_when: A UK or European fintech, payroll provider, or marketplace using Modulr wants AI agents to automate payment account management, bulk payment processing, real-time reconciliation, and embedded payment workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Payment automation without proper approval workflows can cause incorrect or unauthorized payments — implement dual authorization for large payments. Bulk payment files require validation before submission; errors cannot be reversed after settlement. FX payments without rate locking can create FX exposure.

auth.notes: Modulr uses API key and HMAC signature authentication. Request signing with API key and secret for security. Sandbox at sandbox.modulrfinance.com. Webhooks for real-time payment notifications. UK FCA authorized e-money institution. EU PSD2 compliant via Irish EMI license. Documentation at modulr.readme.io. IP allowlisting recommended for production.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free sandbox for development; production requires commercial agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-account and per-transaction pricing; volume discounts for bulk payment programs
pricing.notes: Edinburgh, Scotland. Founded 2016. Private company (Blenheim Chalcot portfolio). UK payment accounts and embedded finance. FCA authorized EMI. Strong in payroll, insurance, and travel sectors. 250+ clients. Direct Faster Payments participant (rare for non-bank). Also EU SEPA via Irish EMI. Competes with Railsr and ClearBank for UK embedded finance.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; bulk payment endpoints for high-volume disbursement

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Payment automation requires approval workflows; implement dual authorization for payments above threshold; errors after settlement cannot be reversed
HMAC signing required — all requests must be HMAC-signed with API secret; implement signing middleware; unsigned requests rejected
Idempotency keys — use unique idempotency keys for all payment submissions to prevent duplicates on retry
Direct Faster Payments — Modulr is a direct participant, not via a sponsor bank; payments can settle in seconds; test webhook handling for rapid settlement
IP allowlisting — production API keys should have IP allowlist configured; unauthorized IP access blocked
Bulk payment validation — validate bulk payment files before submission; partial failure handling requires understanding of which items were processed
agent_readiness.security_notes: UK/EU payment accounts. FCA, PSD2, GDPR. API key + HMAC. EU/UK. Payment account and transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: UK/EU embedded payments. FCA, PSD2, GDPR. API key + HMAC. EU/UK. Payment and account data.
